cards.front: What happens when you use the -d option with the ls command and a * or ? wild card?
cards.back: It removes the special meanings of the wild cards

cards.front: What is the purpose of the -v option when using the ls command with a * or ? wild card?
cards.back: It displays the special meanings of the wild cards

cards.front: How do you remove the special meanings of * and ? wild cards when using the ls command?
What happens when you use the -l option with the ls command and a * or ? wild card?
cards.back: It still displays the special meanings of the wild cards

cards.front: Can you remove the special meanings of a * or ? wild card without using any options?
cards.back: No, you must use the -d option
